productDisplayName: Calvin Klein Men Brown Flip Flops
description: Style Note Ultra-light flip flops from calvin klein - as if the brand name isn't enough to make this top our wishlist, this pair is super comfy as well! Style this with tonal slim chinos and a monochrome tee if you're having a poolside brunch. You could try pairing this with slim-Fit cargo shorts if you're lounging at the beach. Product Details  Brown flip flops with thong style synthetic straps with fabric on the inside  Has a fabric toe separator Branding on the strap and footbed Smooth, printed and textured footbed Rubber outsole with textured grooves Material and Care Synthetic, rubber Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
